name: Standard Cabin
descriptionShort: Give the kids a vacation they'll talk about for years. Cottage 10 is a warm, welcoming two-bedroom cabin crafted with families in mind..
descriptionLong: Give the kids a vacation they'll talk about for years. Cottage 10 is a warm, welcoming two-bedroom cabin crafted with families in mind. The main floor features a king bedroom and a 2-piece bath with separate shower house, while the loft area offers a second king bedroom and a 32 inch flat screen TV with satellite. A screened-in porch overlooks the backyard, where a barbecue and bonfire pit invite evenings under the stars. Inside, a cozy fireplace sets the mood for family game nights or movie marathons.
Address: 5253 Calabogie Road, Calabogie, Ontario K0J 1H0, Canada
shortDescription: Spacious 2-bedroom Lakeside House in Calabogie with backyard and modern amenities...
